name: @rosa-mcp/server
description: ROSA — Released Objects Search Assistant. MCP server and REST API for the SAP Cloudification Repository: search released objects, classic APIs, and successors with Clean Core Level filtering (A/B/C/D).

scripts.bundle: npm run build && esbuild dist/index.js --bundle --platform=node --target=node20 --format=cjs --outfile=bundle/index.cjs && node -e "require('fs').copyFileSync('sap_abbreviation_dictionary.json','bundle/sap_abbreviation_dictionary.json')"
scripts.pkg:win: npm run bundle && pkg bundle/index.cjs --targets node20-win-x64 --output bin/rosa-win.exe
scripts.pkg:linux: npm run bundle && pkg bundle/index.cjs --targets node20-linux-x64 --output bin/rosa-linux
scripts.pkg:macos: npm run bundle && pkg bundle/index.cjs --targets node20-macos-x64 --output bin/rosa-macos
scripts.pkg:all: npm run bundle && pkg bundle/index.cjs --targets node20-win-x64 --output bin/rosa-win.exe && pkg bundle/index.cjs --targets node20-linux-x64 --output bin/rosa-linux && pkg bundle/index.cjs --targets node20-macos-x64 --output bin/rosa-macos
scripts.version: node scripts/sync-version.js && git add mta.yaml README.md

author: Clément Ringot
